scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[1] Filter node with node label predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings
scenarios.description: [1] Filter node with node label predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)-[:ADMIN]-(b)
WHERE a:A
RETURN a.id, b.id

scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[2] Filter node with node label predicate on multi variables without any bindings
scenarios.description: [2] Filter node with node label predicate on multi variables without any bindings

scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[3] Filter node with property predicate on a single variable with multiple bindings
scenarios.description: [3] Filter node with property predicate on a single variable with multiple bindings

scenarios.description: [4] Filter start node of relationship with property predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings

scenarios.description: [5] Filter end node of relationship with property predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings

scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[6] Filter node with a parameter in a property predicate on multi variables with one binding
scenarios.description: [6] Filter node with a parameter in a property predicate on multi variables with one binding

scenarios.description: [7] Filter relationship with relationship type predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings

scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[8] Filter relationship with property predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings
scenarios.description: [8] Filter relationship with property predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings

scenarios.description: [9] Filter relationship with a parameter in a property predicate on multi variables with one binding

scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[10] Filter node with disjunctive property predicate on single variables with multiple bindings
scenarios.description: [10] Filter node with disjunctive property predicate on single variables with multiple bindings
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
WHERE n.p1 = 12 OR n.p2 = 13
RETURN n

scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[11] Filter relationship with disjunctive relationship type predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings
scenarios.description: [11] Filter relationship with disjunctive relationship type predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)-[r]->(x)
WHERE type(r) = 'KNOWS' OR type(r) = 'HATES'
RETURN r

scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[12] Filter path with path length predicate on multi variables with one binding
scenarios.description: [12] Filter path with path length predicate on multi variables with one binding
scenarios.query:
MATCH p = (n)-->(x)
WHERE length(p) = 1
RETURN x

scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[13] Filter path with false path length predicate on multi variables with one binding
scenarios.description: [13] Filter path with false path length predicate on multi variables with one binding
scenarios.query:
MATCH p = (n)-->(x)
WHERE length(p) = 10
RETURN x

scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[14] Fail when filtering path with property predicate
scenarios.description: [14] Fail when filtering path with property predicate
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
MATCH r = (n)-[*]->()
WHERE r.name = 'apa'
RETURN r

scenarios.id: MatchWhere1 - Filter single variable-[15] Fail on aggregation in WHERE
